fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of a variable font.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> describes a single axis of a variable font, including the four-byte tag that identifies the axis, its minimum, default, and maximum design-space values, and whether it is hidden from users.

## Examples

```csharp
foreach (var axis in typeface.VariationDesignParameters)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"Axis: {axis.Tag}, min={axis.Min}, default={axis.Default}, max={axis.Max}");
}
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the default design-space value for this variation axis.
fields.value: The default value in design space.
